inputs.label: Failure Rate (λ)
inputs.businessContext: The rate at which failures occur per unit time (exponential distribution parameter)

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate at which failures occur per unit time (exponential distribution parameter)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim zaman başına meydana gelen arıza oranı (üstel dağılım parametresi)
businessContext_i18n.de: Rate, mit der Ausfälle pro Zeiteinheit auftreten (Parameter der Exponentialverteilung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de défaillance (paramètre de la distribution exponentielle)
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de fallos por unidad de tiempo (parámetro de distribución exponencial)

inputs.label: Time (t)
inputs.businessContext: Time point at which to compute survival probability

businessContext_i18n.en: Time point at which to compute survival probability
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hayatta kalma olasılığının hesaplanacağı zaman noktası
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeitpunkt, zu dem die Überlebenswahrscheinlichkeit berechnet wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Instant auquel calculer la probabilité de survie
businessContext_i18n.es: Punto de tiempo para calcular la probabilidad de supervivencia

inputs.label: Target Survival Probability
inputs.businessContext: Desired survival probability (between 0 and 1) to compute the required time (e.g., B10 life)

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired survival probability (between 0 and 1) to compute the required time (e.g., B10 life)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerekli zamanı hesaplamak için istenen hayatta kalma olasılığı (0 ile 1 arasında) (örneğin, B10 ömrü)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Überlebenswahrscheinlichkeit (zwischen 0 und 1) zur Berechnung der erforderlichen Zeit (z. B. B10-Lebensdauer)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité de survie souhaitée (entre 0 et 1) pour calculer le temps requis (ex. durée de vie B10)
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad de supervivencia deseada (entre 0 y 1) para calcular el tiempo requerido (ej. vida B10)

inputs.label: Observed Failures
inputs.businessContext: Observed number of failures in a test (for reference, not used in calculations)

businessContext_i18n.en: Observed number of failures in a test (for reference, not used in calculations)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir testte gözlemlenen arıza sayısı (referans için, hesaplamalarda kullanılmaz)
businessContext_i18n.de: Beobachtete Anzahl von Ausfällen in einem Test (zur Referenz, nicht in Berechnungen verwendet)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre observé de défaillances lors d'un essai (pour référence, non utilisé dans les calculs)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número observado de fallos en una prueba (para referencia, no se utiliza en cálculos)

inputs.label: Total Test Time
inputs.businessContext: Total operating time of all items under test (for reference, not used in calculations)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total operating time of all items under test (for reference, not used in calculations)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Test edilen tüm öğelerin toplam çalışma süresi (referans için, hesaplamalarda kullanılmaz)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbetriebszeit aller geprüften Einheiten (zur Referenz, nicht in Berechnungen verwendet)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de fonctionnement total de tous les articles en essai (pour référence, non utilisé dans les calculs)
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo total de funcionamiento de todos los elementos bajo prueba (para referencia, no se utiliza en cálculos)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
